{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/107802416?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/yorukot", "id": 107802416, "login": "yorukot", "node_id": "U_kgDOBmzvMA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/yorukot", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-64647", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-116", "name": "Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output"}], "description": "## Impact

A server-side `fetch` with a request body may return a cached **response** body from a different request to the same URL but different body. Confidential data in the `POST`'s **response** body would then leak to unauthorized requests. Though the request itself will not be deduped.

This is only an issue when receiving request bodies with a content type charset other than UTF-8. For example, the UTF-16 byte sequences for `삃삃` and `섄섄` in the request body would share the same cache.

## Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade, consider only making fetch requests with UTF-8 bodies (default in Next.js). Applications using Pages Router are not vulnerable.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4633-3j49-mh5q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T23:06:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4633-3j49-mh5q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4633-3j49-mh5q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-64647"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T23:06:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vercel/next.js/security/advisories/GHSA-4633-3j49-mh5q", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/96008", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/commit/025bf4a5f7b47fb7758c4ebf1c931a61c451c082", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/releases/tag/v15.5.21", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/releases/tag/v16.2.11", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4633-3j49-mh5q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/next.js/security-advisories/GHSA-4633-3j49-mh5q", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vercel/next.js", "summary": "Next.js: Cache confusion of response bodies for requests with bodies containing invalid UTF-8 byte sequences", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T23:06:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4633-3j49-mh5q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "15.5.21", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 13.0.0, < 15.5.21"}, {"first_patched_version": "16.2.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 16.0.0, < 16.2.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Next.js: Cache confusion of response bodies for requests with bodies containing invalid UTF-8 byte sequences
